cakes.name: Classic Chocolate Fudge Cake
cakes.description: A decadent triple-layer chocolate fudge cake made with the finest Belgian chocolate, layered with rich ganache and finished with a silky chocolate buttercream frosting.
cakes.ingredients: Unbleached flour, Belgian dark chocolate (72%), real butter, free-range eggs, caster sugar, full-fat cream, baking powder, pure vanilla extract, sea salt.

cakes.name: Red Velvet Dream
cakes.description: Our signature Red Velvet Cake features moist crimson layers with a subtle cocoa flavour, frosted generously with our house cream cheese buttercream.
cakes.ingredients: Unbleached flour, natural red food colouring, cocoa powder, real butter, cream cheese, buttermilk, free-range eggs, white vinegar, baking soda, vanilla extract.

cakes.name: Lemon Drizzle Delight
cakes.description: A bright and zesty lemon sponge soaked in warm lemon syrup and topped with a sharp lemon glaze. A timeless classic with a refreshing twist.
cakes.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, caster sugar, free-range eggs, fresh lemons (zest & juice), baking powder, full-fat milk, icing sugar.

cakes.name: Strawberry Garden Cake
cakes.description: Layers of light vanilla sponge, fresh whipped cream, and ripe seasonal strawberries. Decorated with whole strawberries and mint for an elegant finish.
cakes.ingredients: Unbleached flour, fresh strawberries, real cream, real butter, free-range eggs, caster sugar, pure vanilla extract, baking powder.

cakes.name: Caramel Pecan Torte
cakes.description: A luxurious multi-layered torte filled with house-made salted caramel, roasted pecans, and velvety caramel buttercream. Perfect for special occasions.
cakes.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, pecans, brown sugar, heavy cream, sea salt, free-range eggs, vanilla extract, baking powder.

pastries.name: Butter Croissant
pastries.description: Hand-laminated with 27 layers of pure butter dough, our croissants are baked fresh every morning to achieve that perfect golden crunch with a pillowy interior.
pastries.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter (27 layers), whole milk, fresh yeast, sea salt, caster sugar, free-range egg (egg wash).

pastries.name: Almond Pain au Chocolat
pastries.description: A luxurious twist on the classic. Our buttery croissant dough wrapped around two batons of Belgian dark chocolate, filled with almond frangipane and topped with toasted almonds.
pastries.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, Belgian dark chocolate, ground almonds, almond extract, free-range eggs, powdered sugar, whole milk, sea salt.

pastries.name: Danish Berry Swirl
pastries.description: Flaky Danish pastry layered with vanilla custard and topped with a swirl of fresh mixed berries and a light apricot glaze.
pastries.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, fresh cream, free-range eggs, mixed berries (strawberry, blueberry, raspberry), pure vanilla, apricot preserve, caster sugar.

pastries.name: Cinnamon Roll
pastries.description: Soft, pillowy dough swirled with cinnamon-butter filling, baked until golden and drizzled with tangy cream cheese glaze while still warm.
pastries.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, whole milk, fresh yeast, cinnamon, brown sugar, cream cheese, vanilla extract, free-range eggs, sea salt.

pastries.name: Eclair au Cafe
pastries.description: Classic choux pastry filled with silky coffee diplomat cream and dipped in a glossy coffee fondant glaze. A Parisian favourite, freshly made daily.
pastries.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, free-range eggs, whole milk, heavy cream, espresso, white chocolate, coffee extract, powdered sugar.

cookies.name: Chunky Chocolate Chip Cookie
cookies.description: Thick, chewy-centred cookies loaded with Belgian dark and milk chocolate chunks. Lightly sea-salted on top for that perfect sweet-salty balance.
cookies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, Belgian dark chocolate chunks, milk chocolate chunks, brown sugar, free-range eggs, pure vanilla extract, sea salt, baking soda.

cookies.name: Snickerdoodle
cookies.description: Soft, pillowy cookies rolled in cinnamon-sugar with a distinctive tangy note from cream of tartar. An American classic done the Bakerz Bite way.
cookies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, caster sugar, free-range eggs, cream of tartar, baking soda, cinnamon, sea salt.

cookies.name: Pistachio & Rose Cookie
cookies.description: Delicate shortbread-style cookies infused with rose water and studded with crushed pistachios, finished with a light dusting of edible rose petals.
cookies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, pistachios, rose water, caster sugar, free-range egg yolk, powdered sugar, edible rose petals.

cookies.name: Classic Shortbread
cookies.description: Three ingredients. Infinite pleasure. Real butter, unbleached flour, and fine sugar — baked slowly for a melt-in-your-mouth crumble. No shortcuts.
cookies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, caster sugar.

pies.name: Apple & Cinnamon Pie
pies.description: Golden, flaky all-butter pastry encasing a generous filling of slow-cooked Bramley apples spiced with cinnamon, nutmeg, and a touch of lemon zest.
pies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, Bramley apples, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, lemon zest, free-range egg (wash), sea salt.

pies.name: Salted Caramel Pecan Pie
pies.description: A Southern-inspired classic elevated with house-made salted caramel, whole roasted pecans, and a hint of bourbon in a buttery shortcrust pastry shell.
pies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, pecans, brown sugar, heavy cream, sea salt, bourbon, free-range eggs, vanilla extract.

pies.name: Classic Lemon Meringue
pies.description: Sharp, tangy lemon curd in a crisp pastry shell, crowned with mountains of toasted Italian meringue. Baked fresh daily.
pies.ingredients: Unbleached flour, real butter, fresh lemons, free-range eggs, caster sugar, cornflour, sea salt.

merchandise.name: Bakerz Bite Signature Mug
merchandise.description: Start your morning right. Our 350ml ceramic mug features the Bakerz Bite logo in embossed gold. Dishwasher safe. Available in cream and charcoal.
merchandise.ingredients: Premium ceramic, food-grade glaze, gold embossed logo.

merchandise.name: Canvas Tote Bag
merchandise.description: Our sturdy 100% organic cotton canvas tote is printed with the Bakerz Bite motto. Perfect for your bakery haul.
merchandise.ingredients: 100% organic cotton canvas, water-based eco-friendly print.

merchandise.name: Glass Tumbler Set (2-pack)
merchandise.description: Set of two 400ml borosilicate glass tumblers etched with the Bakerz Bite logo. Thermal resistant, perfect for hot or cold beverages.
merchandise.ingredients: Borosilicate glass, laser-etched Bakerz Bite branding.

merchandise.name: Branded Serving Tray
merchandise.description: A beautiful bamboo serving tray with engraved Bakerz Bite branding. Ideal for entertaining. Dimensions: 40cm x 28cm with handles.
merchandise.ingredients: Sustainable bamboo, food-safe lacquer finish, laser-engraved branding.

offers.title: Morning Rush Deal
offers.description: Get 20% off on all pastries and beverages ordered before 10:00 AM. Fresh from the oven, delivered to your table.

offers.title: Buy 6 Cookies, Get 2 Free
offers.description: Mix and match any 6 cookies from our cookie selection and we'll add 2 of your choice absolutely free. A sweet deal every day.

offers.title: Weekend Cake Special
offers.description: Enjoy 15% off on all whole cakes ordered for weekend collection. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or just because.

offers.title: Loyalty Card — 10th Item Free
offers.description: Collect a stamp for every purchase. On your 10th item, treat yourself to any item up to $5.00 completely on us. Ask staff for your loyalty card.

faqs.q: Do you offer custom cakes for special occasions?
faqs.a: Absolutely! We love creating bespoke cakes for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, and corporate events. Please contact us at least 5 days in advance with your requirements and we'll make something truly special.

faqs.q: Are your products made fresh daily?
faqs.a: Yes! Every product at Bakerz Bite is made fresh in-store every single day. We never use frozen dough or pre-made mixes. Our bakers start at 4:00 AM to ensure everything is ready by opening time.

faqs.q: Do you cater for dietary requirements (gluten-free, vegan, nut-free)?
faqs.a: We offer a growing range of gluten-free and vegan options. Our kitchen does handle nuts, so we cannot guarantee a completely nut-free environment. Please speak to our staff about specific allergen needs.

faqs.q: Can I place a bulk or corporate order?
faqs.a: Yes! We offer attractive discounts for bulk orders of 20+ items. Email us at orders@bakerzbite.com or call us for a quote. We supply offices, events, and catering companies regularly.
We are open Monday to Friday: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Saturday: 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Sunday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM.
Yes, we offer local delivery within a 5-mile radius. Orders must be placed by 12:00 PM for same-day delivery. A delivery fee applies. You can also order through our website for collection.
